name: signoz
description: Query SigNoz observability data(metrics, traces, logs, alerts, dashboards, services) via the SigNoz Cloud hosted MCP server.

settings.name: SIGNOZ_REGION
settings.label: SigNoz Cloud region
settings.description: Your SigNoz Cloud region. Find it under Settings → Ingestion in SigNoz, or see https://signoz.io/docs/ingestion/signoz-cloud/overview/#endpoint. Values: us, in, eu, us2, in2, eu2
